title: Google Drive column for a *folder*
excerpt:
I just want the Files column type to be able to leverage a Google Drive folder. Right now, it stops at files. 
I don’t want to paste in the URL, I want a folder. 
How can I get this? 
– 
Frustrated rookie Monday.com user…

posts.author: parakeet (parakeet)
posts.cookedHtml:
I just want the Files column type to be able to leverage a Google Drive folder. Right now, it stops at files.

I don’t want to paste in the URL, I want a folder.

How can I get this?

–

Frustrated rookie Monday.com user here.

Everywhere I turn in Monday.com, there are missing features - available to solve at an extra price from the app marketplace.
